meta_title: For Founders: passive income to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Passive Income to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop searching for project ideas. Learn how to generate passive income as a founder using Antigravity and Claude Code in this beginner-friendly blueprint.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing 'perfect' ideas. Instead, build micro-SaaS tools that solve specific, high-friction pain points in established marketplaces. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you can deploy revenue-generating assets in days, not months. Focus on small, repeatable value, not grand, unproven inventions.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You have the technical hunger and the drive to build, but the 'idea paralysis' has you trapped in an endless loop of research that yields nothing but lost time. While others wait for a lightning strike of inspiration, elite founders are already shipping micro-SaaS products that solve boring, profitable problems.

Passive income isn't a myth; it's the result of engineering a system that provides value while you sleep. By treating code as an asset class rather than just a project, you shift from 'dreaming' to 'deploying.' It’s time to stop waiting for the right idea and start building the infrastructure that makes ideas obsolete.

steps.title: Validate the Pain Point
steps.description: Identify a recurring manual task in a niche market (e.g., SEO, real estate, or accounting). Confirm it's worth paying for by searching Reddit or Niche forums for people complaining about current software costs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a market researcher. Analyze the top 10 complaints in the [Insert Niche] subreddit and identify a repetitive task that can be automated via a browser extension or SaaS API.
steps.claude_code_command: claude research 'Analyze [Niche] subreddit for high-pain manual tasks with revenue potential'

steps.title: Scaffold the MVP
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate code for your micro-SaaS. This skips the setup phase, allowing you to focus on the core value proposition immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, scalable Next.js and Supabase boilerplate for a subscription-based micro-SaaS. Include Stripe integration, authentication, and a dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize project structure using Antigravity boilerplate for a SaaS with Stripe'

steps.title: Build the Core Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write your primary automation engine. Provide context on the specific data flow required to solve the user's problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft the backend logic for processing user data from [Source] and outputting a formatted report in [Format]. Ensure error handling for API failures.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement the core data processing logic for the SaaS MVP based on the provided requirements'

steps.title: Implement Stripe Monetization
steps.description: Connect your application to Stripe to ensure you are capturing revenue from day one. Do not build without a payment gateway.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure Stripe webhook handler to manage subscription tiers and user access levels in my database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Integrate Stripe Checkout and webhook handling for recurring billing'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Use automated CI/CD pipelines to push your code to a live environment. Speed to market is your only true competitive advantage.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Vercel deployment configuration file that optimizes my build for performance and SEO.
steps.claude_code_command: claude deploy 'Configure Vercel build settings and trigger initial deployment'

pro_tips: Always charge from day one; if users won't pay for the MVP, they won't pay for the polished version.
Focus on 'boring' niches like B2B compliance or data conversion; they have the highest churn resistance.
Use Claude Code to write your documentation while you code; it keeps your technical debt transparent.
Don't build a custom UI; use a component library like shadcn/ui to save 20+ hours of design time.
Automate your marketing: build a script that posts your updates to Twitter/LinkedIn every time you commit to production.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, spend 80% of your time on distribution. Reach out to the users you identified in step 1, offer them a lifetime deal for feedback, and iterate based on their actual usage data.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the blueprint, and the mindset to stop waiting and start earning. Every hour you spend debating is an hour of lost revenue. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
